element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player begins with simple stepping patterns on Power Pad
Introduces combined hand and foot movements in later levels
Harder songs unlock progressively through Normal Mode completion

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Pad Antics Mode (unlocked after Normal Mode progression)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Creative mode with no failure condition; player composes melodies
Player recalls and repeats musical sequences in eidetic fashion
Complex hand/foot hybrid instructions requiring spatial awareness

typical_relief_triggers: Entering Aerobics Mode (no failure condition; forgiving scoring)
Free-form Tune Up mode (creative expression without penalty)
typical_tension_triggers: Score counter decreasing by 10 per mistake in Normal Mode
Unlocked harder songs with increased complexity
Hand + foot coordination requirements in advanced levels
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive difficulty escalation with three distinct difficulty contexts: beginner-friendly Normal Mode with forgiving Aerobics fallback, intermediate skill-building in Pad Antics, and optional high-difficulty content unlock structure

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Unlocking additional 4 Studios (6-8) by successfully completing initial 4 Studios (5, 10, 15, 20)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Studio 5 and Studio 10: simple footwork patterns, 4-pad sequences, safe learning environment
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Studio 15 and Studio 20: introduction of hand coordination, multi-limb choreography, moderate complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Unlocked Studios (6-8): advanced sequences combining complex hand-foot patterns and higher tempo demands
notable_spikes: Transition from foot-only to hand+foot coordination
Ditto mode in Pad Antics (Twister-like spatial complexity)
Unlocked advanced Studios requiring sustained coordination

notable_level_patterns.description: Four base Studios (5, 10, 15, 20) serve as content gates; completion unlocks 4 additional harder Studios. Difficulty increases linearly within this sequence. Score begins at 100, decreases by 10 per mistake, failure on zero.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Studio 5 → Studio 10 → Studio 15 → Studio 20 → Unlocked Studios

notable_level_patterns.description: Same 4 base songs (Studios 5, 10, 15, 20) available in Aerobics Mode but with forgiving scoring—counter reaches 0 and music continues. Removes failure condition entirely, providing difficulty relief valve.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Aerobics Mode reuses Normal Mode content with modified scoring

notable_level_patterns.description: Three mini-game modes testing different cognitive/physical skills: Tune Up (free-form composition, no failure), Mat Melodies (rote memory sequences), Ditto (spatial hand-foot coordination). Progression from creative to challenging.
